error_signature: variables and formulas being copied randomly
title: Random duplication of variables and formulas in components
symptom: When copying components, variables and formulas are sometimes duplicated unexpectedly, leading to confusion in the project.
not_this_if: The 'duplicate variable' option is not selected
root_cause: When a component is created, the associated variables are also duplicated. If the 'duplicate variable' option is selected when placing the component on the page, it can lead to unintended duplication of those variables and formulas.
fix_steps: Select the component you want to place on the page
Ensure the 'duplicate variable' option is unselected
Place the component on the page
agent_instruction: Unselect the 'duplicate variable' option when placing the component to avoid random duplication.
